{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Hara
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Hara]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
